languages.text: "Удивлен, что они все еще функционируют." {n}Лицевые мышцы Эоганна подергиваются, словно манипулус всеми силами пытается не скривиться в гримасе отвращения.{/n} "Возможно, здешний воздух способствует замедленному распаду органики... или, же, быть может, даже сервиторы обладают некоторым подобием воли к жизни. Что, Нунциус?" {n}Генетор оборачивается к своему сервочерепу.{/n} "Нет, на машинное чудо этот... феномен все же не похож".

"I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."
languages.original_text: "Удивлен, что они все еще функционируют." {n}Лицевые мышцы Эоганна подергиваются, словно манипулус всеми силами пытается не скривиться в гримасе отвращения.{/n} "Возможно, здешний воздух способствует замедленному распаду органики... или, же, быть может, даже сервиторы обладают некоторым подобием воли к жизни. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

"I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

"I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

languages.text: «Me sorprende que sigan funcionando». {n}Los músculos faciales de Eogunn se contraen como si el manipulus realizara un esfuerzo titánico por no hacer una mueca de asco.{/n} «Es posible que el aire local ralentice la decadencia de la materia orgánica... o tal vez incluso los servidores sientan ganas de vivir. ¿Qué dice, Nuncius?». {n} El genetor se gira hacia su servocráneo.{/n} «Discrepo, este fenómeno no se parece en nada a un milagro mecánico».
languages.original_text: "I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

traits.locale_text: «Me sorprende que sigan funcionando». {n}Los músculos faciales de Eogunn se contraen como si el manipulus realizara un esfuerzo titánico por no hacer una mueca de asco.{/n} «Es posible que el aire local ralentice la decadencia de la materia orgánica... o tal vez incluso los servidores sientan ganas de vivir. ¿Qué dice, Nuncius?». {n} El genetor se gira hacia su servocráneo.{/n} «Discrepo, este fenómeno no se parece en nada a un milagro mecánico».

languages.text: “我很惊讶它们居然还在运转。”{n}伊奥贡的面部肌肉抽动了一下，仿佛正费力地压抑厌恶的表情。{/n}“也许这里的空气就是容易让有机物慢慢腐烂……抑或是，连机仆也拥有某种类似于求生意志的东西。怎么了，努恩修斯？”{n}这位基因士转向他的伺服头骨。{/n}“不，这个特殊现象看起来完全不像是机械神迹。”
languages.original_text: "I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

traits.locale_text: “我很惊讶它们居然还在运转。”{n}伊奥贡的面部肌肉抽动了一下，仿佛正费力地压抑厌恶的表情。{/n}“也许这里的空气就是容易让有机物慢慢腐烂……抑或是，连机仆也拥有某种类似于求生意志的东西。怎么了，努恩修斯？”{n}这位基因士转向他的伺服头骨。{/n}“不，这个特殊现象看起来完全不像是机械神迹。”

languages.text: « Je suis surpris qu'ils fonctionnent encore. » {n}Le visage d'Eogunn est agité de tics nerveux, comme s'il retenait à grand-peine une grimace de dégoût.{/n} « L'air d'ici permet peut-être de ralentir la dégradation de la matière organique... à moins que même les servitors possèdent une certaine volonté de vivre. Comment, Nuncius ? » {n}Le genetor se tourne vers son servocrâne.{/n} « Non, ce phénomène précis ne ressemble pas à un miracle de la machine, tout compte fait. »
languages.original_text: "I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis surpris qu'ils fonctionnent encore. » {n}Le visage d'Eogunn est agité de tics nerveux, comme s'il retenait à grand-peine une grimace de dégoût.{/n} « L'air d'ici permet peut-être de ralentir la dégradation de la matière organique... à moins que même les servitors possèdent une certaine volonté de vivre. Comment, Nuncius ? » {n}Le genetor se tourne vers son servocrâne.{/n} « Non, ce phénomène précis ne ressemble pas à un miracle de la machine, tout compte fait. »

languages.text: "Hâlâ çalışıyor olmalarına şaşırdım." {n}Eogunn'un yüz kasları seğiriyor. Sanki Manipülus, tiksintiyle yüzünü buruşturmamak için büyük bir çaba sarf ediyor.{/n} "Belki de buradaki hava, organik maddenin yavaşça çürümesine elverişlidir... Ya da belki hizmetörler bile yaşama isteğine benzer bir şeye sahiptir. O da ne Nuncius?" {n}Genetör, hizmelete dönüyor.{/n} "Hayır, bu özel fenomen, hiç de makine mucizesi gibi görünmüyor."
languages.original_text: "I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

traits.locale_text: "Hâlâ çalışıyor olmalarına şaşırdım." {n}Eogunn'un yüz kasları seğiriyor. Sanki Manipülus, tiksintiyle yüzünü buruşturmamak için büyük bir çaba sarf ediyor.{/n} "Belki de buradaki hava, organik maddenin yavaşça çürümesine elverişlidir... Ya da belki hizmetörler bile yaşama isteğine benzer bir şeye sahiptir. O da ne Nuncius?" {n}Genetör, hizmelete dönüyor.{/n} "Hayır, bu özel fenomen, hiç de makine mucizesi gibi görünmüyor."

languages.text: 「まだ機能していることに驚かされます」{n}エオガンの顔の筋肉がひくついた。まるでマニピュルスが、嫌悪に顔をしかめまいと途方もない努力をしているかのように。{/n}「おそらく、ここの空気が有機物質の緩やかな腐敗を促しているのでしょう……あるいは、サーヴィターでさえ生への意志に似た何かを備えているのかもしれません。何ですか、ヌンキウス？」{n}ゲネターは自らのサーヴォスカルへと向き直った。{/n}「いいえ、この特異な現象は、結局のところ機械の奇跡とは似ても似つかぬようです」
languages.original_text: "I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

traits.locale_text: 「まだ機能していることに驚かされます」{n}エオガンの顔の筋肉がひくついた。まるでマニピュルスが、嫌悪に顔をしかめまいと途方もない努力をしているかのように。{/n}「おそらく、ここの空気が有機物質の緩やかな腐敗を促しているのでしょう……あるいは、サーヴィターでさえ生への意志に似た何かを備えているのかもしれません。何ですか、ヌンキウス？」{n}ゲネターは自らのサーヴォスカルへと向き直った。{/n}「いいえ、この特異な現象は、結局のところ機械の奇跡とは似ても似つかぬようです」

languages.text: "Ich bin überrascht, dass sie noch funktionieren." {n}Die Muskeln in Eogunns Gesicht zucken, als müsse sich der Manipulus bemühen, nicht angewidert das Gesicht zu verziehen.{/n} "Vielleicht leitet die Luft hier den langsamen Verfall organischer Materie weiter ... oder selbst Servitoren haben eine Art Überlebenswillen. Was ist das, Nuncius?" {n}Der Genetor dreht sich zu seinem Servoschädel um.{/n} "Nein, dieses besondere Phänomen scheint kein Maschinenwunder zu sein."
languages.original_text: "I am surprised they're still functioning." {n}Eogunn's facial muscles twitch, as if the Manipulus is making a titanic effort not to grimace in disgust.{/n} "Perhaps the air here is conducive to the slow decay of the organic matter... or perhaps even servitors possess something akin to a will to live. What's that, Nuncius?" {n}The Genetor turns to his servo-skull.{/n} "No, this particular phenomenon does not seem anything like a machine miracle after all."

"Was ist das, Nuncius?" {n}Der Genetor dreht sich zu seinem Servoschädel um.{/n} "Nein, dieses besondere Phänomen scheint kein Maschinenwunder zu sein."
